name: wildfire-exposure-eo alt AOI — Sever do Vouga / Aveiro

properties.name: Sever do Vouga / Albergaria-a-Velha / Oliveira de Azeméis
properties.description: Alternative pilot AOI centered on the September 2024 Aveiro-district fires — > 47,000 ha burned in the north-centre over a few days, multiple fatalities, residential damage in Sever do Vouga and Albergaria-a-Velha, state of calamity declared.
properties.rationale: Most recent severe burn at the time of pilot selection (Sept 2024), wildland-urban interface (WUI) damage, dense e-Redes / REN power infrastructure exposure, strong OSM coverage, eucalyptus-heavy fuel mix typical of the Centro–Norte transition.
properties.source: Alternative for PRE_DEV_CHECKLIST.md item D — see docs/aoi_rationale.md.
